suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the standard synthesis format pattern: comparative tables, file:line citations, severity ratings, and declared winners with quantitative scores. This pattern was consistently used across all synthesis workers and should be codified for future analysis tasks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four synthesis workers (code-quality, functionality, tests, docs) produced documents with the same structure: (1) comparative tables with scores per criterion, (2) specific evidence citations with file:line format, (3) severity ratings for issues, (4) clear winner declarations with justification. This consistency suggests it's an emergent best practice.

rejectedObservations.observation: The synthesis follows the expected format from AGENTS.md: comparative tables, specific evidence citations, and clear winner declarations with quantitative scores.
rejectedObservations.reason: This confirms correct behavior but doesn't represent new knowledge to capture - it's validation that existing guidance works correctly.

keyFindings: main has cleaner architecture with consistent patterns
gem introduces TOON formatter with some long functions
3 critical bugs identified in gem: SQL validation regression, mutex bug, breaking changes

criticalBugs.description: SQL Validation REGRESIÓN - No detecta inyección SQL
criticalBugs.fix: Restore dangerous keyword detection from main branch

criticalBugs.description: Mutex bug - mutex local no sincroniza entre goroutines
criticalBugs.fix: Move mutex to ExportPages level for shared synchronization

criticalBugs.description: Breaking changes sin migración - CSV/human eliminados, retry-failed removido
criticalBugs.fix: Document in CHANGELOG and provide migration guide
